videoSnippet.title: A Legend Is Born! || Yağız Kaan Erdoğmuş vs Veselin Topalov || Clash of Generations III G6
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Erdogmus, Yagiz Kaan (2687) - Topalov, Veselin (2717) 
Topalov vs. Erdogmus: Clash of Generations III (Chess.com) [06] 2026.04.17
C03 French, Tarrasch

1.e4 e6 2.d4 d5 3.Nd2 a6 4.Ngf3 c5 5.dxc5 Bxc5 6.Bd3 Nf6 7.O-O dxe4 8.Nxe4 Nxe4 9.Bxe4 Qxd1 10.Rxd1 Nd7 11.Nd2 f5 12.Bf3 Ne5 13.Bh5+ g6 14.Be2 Nf7 15.Nb3 Bb6 16.Bd2 O-O 17.Bc3 Re8 18.a4 e5 19.a5 Ba7 20.Bc4 Rb8 21.Kf1 Be6 22.Bxe6 Rxe6 23.Rd7 Kf8 24.Bb4+ Ke8 25.Rc7 h5 26.Rd1 Rd8 27.Rxd8+ Nxd8 28.Rg7 Nc6 29.Rxb7 Nxb4 30.Rxb4 Rc6 31.Rb7 Bc5 32.c3 Bd6 33.Ke2 Bc7 34.Ra7 Kd7 35.Rxa6 Rxa6 36.Nc5+ Kc6 37.Nxa6 Bxa5 38.b4 Bb6 39.c4 e4 40.b5+ Kd6 41.f3 exf3+ 42.Kxf3
